name: Gatling Gun
description:
Although it has a rotating, minigun-like barrel, this Jakobs rifle is semi-automatic and unleashes several shots per trigger pull. It can reach very high practical fire rates, but you must keep tapping the trigger and contend with Jakobs-style slow reloads.

Strong per-shot damage lets it dump heavy damage quickly. Recoil is pronounced, and the magazine empties fast because each trigger pull spends three rounds on a modest capacity.
notes: Only appears at green rarity or higher.
